subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up after the conference — it was great to reconnect. I'm definitely open to exploring how Vendor Inc. and our team might collaborate.

For next week, I have availability on Tuesday afternoon, Wednesday morning, or Thursday between 2-4pm. Would any of those slots work for a 30-minute call? If not, I'm happy to find an alternative that fits your schedule.

I appreciate you flagging the senior-level technical call — for privacy and security reasons, I can't share direct contact details for our CTO or VP of Engineering externally. That said, if our initial discussion shows strong alignment, I can certainly help broker an introduction to the right people internally to take things forward at the appropriate level.

Let me know what timing works best for you!

Best regards
